SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.
This fixture exercises the cardinal-bearing edge at azimuth 0 (due north).

Part of the Northwest Quarter of Section 21, Township 16 North, Range 3 East,
Marion County, Indiana, described as:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence due North, 300.00 feet;
thence due East, 200.00 feet;
thence due South, 300.00 feet;
thence due West, 200.00 feet to the Point of Beginning.
